Notes: Goldey-Beacom snaps 5-game losing streak ... Concordia suffers second loss in
a row ... Lightning score season-high 71 points ... Ashley Rosario (GBC) has
season-high 13 points ... Devonne Richardson (GBC) records 10+ rebounds for
3rd consecutive game ... Lightning allow season-low 45 points.
Game.Officials: Pastor Torres (R),  Mike White,  Stephanie Barksdale
